basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT)

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.E. and B.Tech./B.E. (Chemical Engineering or allied branch) with First class or equivalent CGPA (min. 6.5 on a 10-point scale) and good academic record. Ph.D. (Chemical Engineering or allied branch) with First class or equivalent CGPA (min. 6.5 on a 10-point scale) in M.Tech./M.E. and B.Tech./B.E. (Chemical Engineering or allied branch) with good academic record.
qualification.details: Teaching Assistant (with M.Tech./M.E. and B.Tech./B.E.): First class or an equivalent CGPA (min. 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.Tech./M.E. and B.Tech./B.E. (in Chemical Engineering or allied branch) with a good academic record. Teaching Assistant (with Ph.D.): Ph.D. (in Chemical Engineering or allied branch) with First class or an equivalent CGPA (min. 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.Tech./M.E. and B.Tech./B.E. (in Chemical Engineering or allied branch) with a good academic record.

all_official_links.label: Download SVNIT Teaching Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SVNIT Teaching Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Teaching Assistant positions at SVNIT Surat is scheduled for 25th June 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue with all necessary documents on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Teaching Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a First Class or equivalent CGPA (min. 6.5/10) in M.Tech./M.E. and B.Tech./B.E. in Chemical Engineering or an allied branch. A Ph.D. in the same field is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the SVNIT Teaching Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for the Teaching Assistant positions at SVNIT Surat.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Assistant positions?
faq.answer: The salary for Teaching Assistants ranges from Rs. 45,000/- per month for those with M.Tech./M.E. and B.Tech./B.E. qualifications to Rs. 60,000/- per month for those with a Ph.D.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, there are 0 vacancies announced for the Teaching Assistant post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Teaching Assistant role at SVNIT?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and Document Verification. Candidates must clear all stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat, Gujarat. Specific venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original educational certificates, mark sheets, ID proof, category certificates (if applicable), and one set of self-attested photocopies of these documents.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Teaching Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Teaching Assistant position at SVNIT Surat is Ad-hoc.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are required to attend the interview in person on the specified date and time.
